leadText: The Relic Copper (Japanese: こだいのどうか Ancient Bronze Coin) is a valuable item introduced in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Relic Copper serves no practical purpose other than to be sold.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 A copper coin used in a civilization about 3,000 years ago. A maniac will buy it for a high price. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E A copper coin used by an ancient civilization about 3,000 years ago. Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A copper coin used by an ancient civilization about three thousand years ago.

sections.title: In the core series games
